cases.notes: The critical inline-error requirement is clearly met with a specific, Ukrainian, non-accusatory, exclamation-free message ("Невірний email або пароль"). The only gap is the lack of an actionable next step (e.g., a password-reset link/suggestion).

RE-GRADED with a clean accessibility-tree capture (fill invalid 3-char password, submit): confirms a distinct banner-style error "Пароль має містити щонайменше 8 символів." renders at the top of the form, separate from the field's always-present static hint "Мінімум 8 символів". Resolves the prior round's doubt — this was a capture-methodology false negative, not a real product bug. Ukrainian, exclamation-free, specific about the 8-character minimum, field values preserved (no submit). Miss: banner is page-level rather than DOM-attached to the password input, same class as memory-title-too-long.
Redirect to /login with no flash of protected content is clearly evidenced. Miss: no returnTo/redirect param preserved, so the user's intended destination is lost across login.
Inline, Ukrainian, specific, non-accusatory message ("Email вже зареєстровано"). Miss: no suggested next step (login/reset) alongside the message.
Clear, warm, actionable Ukrainian empty state. Miss: references "these filters" generically rather than naming the specific selected city/topic.

Warm, Ukrainian, exclamation-free tooltip + comments-section prompt explaining login is required to give warmth. Miss: no inline clickable CTA at the point of friction (only the always-present header "Увійти" link).

RE-GRADED after fix: submitting years="2025-1990" now puts a red border on the "Роки" field with "Перевірте діапазон років — кінцевий рік не може бути раніше початкового." beneath it; the form does not submit. A matching server-side 400 check was added for defense-in-depth against direct API calls. Ukrainian, exclamation-free, names the exact constraint. Closes the prior scope gap (years was previously fully unvalidated).

Dedicated, Ukrainian, actionable empty state. Misses: generic "these filters" wording, and tone reads procedural rather than warm for this emotionally-charged feature; no "create a request" CTA surfaced.

RE-GRADED after per-field validation rework: the description Textarea itself gets a red border with "Опишіть, що саме шукаєте." beneath it; correctly-filled city/contact-email fields show no error. Combined misleading banner is gone. Ukrainian, exclamation-free, states the requirement. Miss: phrasing reads neutral rather than emotionally warm for this feature.

RE-GRADED after per-field validation rework: submitting blank shows a distinct "Вкажіть назву спогаду." under the title field and a separate "Додайте текст спогаду." under the text field — no longer a shared banner. Ukrainian, exclamation-free, professional. Miss: no additional guidance beyond stating the requirement.
Strong on-brand empty state ("Тут поки тихо") with clear CTA. Miss: no icon/illustration, just typographic treatment.

RE-GRADED after backend restart: the field-specific message is now Ukrainian ("Назва не може перевищувати 255 символів") and surfaced as the top-level error. It's a page-level shared banner rather than literally DOM-attached to the title input, but it unambiguously names the field, matches AGENTS.md's documented shared-banner convention, and blocks submission. Miss: no current-count-vs-limit display (e.g. "300/255").

RE-GRADED after the placeholder fix: the reason textarea now shows "Наприклад: образливий зміст, спам або чужі персональні дані" as non-blocking guidance. Ukrainian, warm, exclamation-free, and the optional-field submission still succeeds. Miss: doesn't explicitly explain why context helps moderators, just gives category examples.

Non-admin is silently redirected to the home page with zero flash or leakage of admin structure. Silent redirect (no explicit message) is a defensible security pattern, costing only a small deduction.
